description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI - Development that can be triggered manually with a commit or tag input and on push events to all branches except release/*. The workflow should run on a Docker environment with write permissions for ID token and repository contents. It should clean up the Docker environment, checkout the specified commit or tag, set up QEMU and Docker Buildx, configure GCP credentials, login to the GCP registry, determine the image tag, build a Docker image with the tag, and push it to the GCP registry.
